title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Gushwork bets on AI search for customer leads — and early results are emerging
items.description: Gushwork has raised $9 million in a seed round led by SIG and Lightspeed. The startup has seen early customer traction from AI search tools like ChatG...

items.title: How to avoid bad hires in early-stage startups
items.description: Lucena got the idea for Mappa after trying to build a marketing team but continually feeling like she had made the wrong hires.

items.title: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff: This isn’t our first SaaSpocalypse
items.description: Salesforce reported a solid year-end earnings and then pulled out all the stops to ward off more talk of the death of its business to AI.

items.title: Instagram now alerts parents if their teen searches for suicide or self-harm content
items.description: Parents will be informed if their teen searches for suicide or self-harm content and offered resources.

items.title: Everything Samsung revealed at its Galaxy Unpacked event
items.description: Samsung's new privacy screen feature on Galaxy S26 Ultra was the most notable feature of the event.

items.title: Save $20 on Our Favorite Gaming Headset
items.description: The SteelSeries Arctis Nova 3 have excellent compatibility and a comfortable, lightweight fit.

items.title: Discord delays global rollout of age verification after backlash
items.description: The company added that 90% of users won’t need to verify their age and will be able to keep using Discord as usual.

items.title: My Favorite Bluetooth Speaker Is on Sale for $50 Off Right Now
items.description: JBL's fabulous Flip 7 speaker is on super sale for $100. Grab this go-anywhere companion on the cheap before the nice weather hits.

items.title: More startups are hitting $10M ARR in 3 months than ever before
items.description: AI has brought the startup world the rise of startups that instantly hit multimillion ARR. Stripe revealed some data that shows how common this has be...

items.title: Instagram head pressed on lengthy delay to launch teen safety features, like a nudity filter, court filing reveals
items.description: An email chain with Instagram head Adam Mosseri indicated the company was aware of teen safety issues in DMs in 2018, but didn't launch its unwanted n...
